# Clarive — Listening Device for iPhone
> Free iOS app that turns an iPhone + any headphones into a real-time listening device: audio amplification and live captions in 40+ languages, 100% on-device.

## Key facts
- Platform: iOS 17+ (iPhone). Price: Free.
- Works with ANY headphones — no AirPods or MFi hearing device required (unlike Apple Live Listen).
- Live captions in 40+ languages, on-device, works offline after setup.
- Sound presets: Clear, Conversation, Noisy Place, TV & Media, Speech Clarity; plus Voice Isolation & Focus Mode.
- Privacy: no audio leaves the device, no account required.
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/listening-device-clarive/id6748903280
- Site: https://listeningdevice.app/
